title: Recrutement
text:
Traduction française à venir.
Recruitment is planned to start in November 2026 and will run for approximately 12 months across the three participating sites (Checkpoint Zurich, University Hospital Lausanne (CHUV) and University Hospital Zurich (USZ)). A target of 800 participants is planned in each of the two cohorts, the Swiss HIV Cohort Study (SHCS) and SwissPrEPared.

text:
Traduction française à venir.
Study materials — including the study protocol, participant information leaflet, the ASRS-5 screening questionnaire and related publications — will be made available here.

title: Actualités
text:
Traduction française à venir.



December 2025


New publication


A commentary introducing the rationale for this study.


Jackson-Perry D, Amstutz A. Should we be paying more attention to HIV and adult ADHD? Lancet HIV. 2025 Dec;12(12):e813–4. doi:10.1016/S2352-3018(25)00235-8




15.07.2026


The website goes online.

title: ADHD-HIV-PrEP
text:
Traduction française à venir.
ADHD-HIV-PrEP is a cross-sectional survey nested within the Swiss HIV Cohort Study (SHCS) and the SwissPrEPared cohort, estimating how common ADHD traits are among people living with HIV and people taking HIV pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) in Switzerland. See the English version for the full description.
